title: Rising Airfreight Revenues Aid Expeditors (EXPD) Despite High Debt
text: Expeditors (EXPD) currently benefits from an uptick in airfreight revenues and investor-friendly steps. However, a decline in its current ratio is concerning.

title: Adding To My Expeditors International Position
text: In spite of a nice run up in price since I posted my bullish article on this name, the valuation is even more attractive today. In some ways, this makes no sense to me in light of the growth in the business. I want to take advantage of the fear wrought by the cyberattack.

title: 8 Attractively Valued Dividend Growth Stocks Based On P/FCF
text: The Price to Free Cash Flow Ratio is an excellent valuation metric for finding attractively valued companies. The ratio has been proven to work historically and makes sense conceptually as a valuation technique.

title: Expeditors International: Back on Track After Cyberattack
text: Roughly four months ago, on Feb. 20, Expeditors International of Washington Inc. ( EXPD , Financial) had its IT systems hit with a cyberattack. It took roughly three weeks to get those systems fully back in operation.

title: Expeditors International (EXPD) Down 2.7% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
text: Expeditors International (EXPD) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
